---
name: Feedback
about: Share what's working, what isn't, or what you wish InfoBlend did
title: ''
labels: feedback
assignees: ''
---

**What were you trying to do?**
<!-- e.g. "Look up a French phrase on a Wikipedia article" -->

**What happened?**
<!-- The actual result. Screenshots welcome. -->

**What did you expect?**
<!-- The result you were hoping for. -->

**Which feature is this about?**
<!-- Pick any that apply: -->
- [ ] Definitions (double-click / select)
- [ ] Pronunciation (TTS or recorded audio)
- [ ] Summaries (Ctrl+K → Summarize)
- [ ] Translation (right-click → Translate)
- [ ] Chat with the Page (Ctrl+K → `?`)
- [ ] Saved / Knowledge Vault
- [ ] Settings popup
- [ ] Other:

**Environment**
- Browser + version (e.g. Chrome 121):
- OS:
- AI key configured (yes / no, provider):
- URL where it happened (if shareable):

**Anything else?**
